note: Bespoke per-chapter media prompts for caps 16-30 of aprenda-a-usar-inteligencia-artificial-no-seu-dia-a-dia. Composition MOTIF repeats per slot (design language, matches original script's per-slot idea), but concrete objects/nouns are uniquely grounded in each chapter's actual text (Conceitos-Chave / Fluxo de Execucao / Cenarios Aplicados / Erros Comuns / Dica Pro). Assembled prompt = f"{THEME_SETTING}, {IMAGE[cap][slot]}, {THEME_ACCENT} glow" + FUSION (FUSION suffix identical to reference script). Video motion texts replace VIDEO_MOTION[slot] fixed strings from the reference script, per chapter.

module3_caps16-20.theme_setting: real study corner with open books, a warm lamp and floating glowing flashcards

module4_caps21-25.theme_setting: real creative desk with a notebook, a camera and loose sketches turning into a polished glowing draft

module5_caps26-30.theme_setting: real quiet desk with a closed drawer and a tidy folder of documents beside a small softly glowing lock icon

image.sistema: the mascot stacking two different translucent glowing layers into a tower — one layer dusty and frozen like an old photograph, the other layer bright and rippling like a live signal — beside an open book and a small radar-like search icon, one dim frozen layer making the tower lean
image.intencao: on one side the mascot calmly writing on a small glowing planning card labeled with a lightbulb 'entendi', on the other side a friendly robotic arm testing the mascot with a closed book and a blank recall card three days later, a clear gap of soft light between reading and remembering
image.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the table from a fork-shaped signpost marked with two glowing coin icons (CDB and Tesouro Direto) to a small glowing notebook, the tiny mascot walking on the stones mid-journey, one stone shaped like a question mark, one stone glowing brighter as layered explanation, one stone dimmed representing closed-eyes recall
image.cenario: a swirl of misty crumpled paper scraps shaped like loan installment slips and a bank counter sign rising above the table and condensing into one crisp glowing amortization chart marked '36' that the mascot proudly holds up, a second faint glowing law-book icon beside a calendar checking 'today or past?'
image.validacao: the mascot examining a glowing paper scroll marked 'explica tudo sobre X' through a large magnifying glass against an unrolled glowing reference map split into training-dust and live-search halves, a kind amber warning light above, a small round blank wax stamp resting unused
image.dica: the mascot writing a glowing checklist card with three numbered check marks beside a small blindfolded scroll icon representing not looking back, behind it a large friendly launch button waiting dimmed until the list is complete

video.fluxo: The five glowing stepping stones pulse in sequence from the coin-icon signpost toward the notebook, the tiny mascot walks gently forward pausing longer on the dimmed recall stone, warm dust motes drift, slow cinematic push-in, seamless loop
video.dica: The three numbered check marks on the glowing card light up one at a time while the blindfold icon stays closed, the mascot's pen moves gently without peeking back, the launch button slowly brightens as the last mark completes, warm ambient drift, slow cinematic push-in, seamless loop
